ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender_status" TEXT /* Gender status of the customer */,
  "other_signators" TEXT /* Other signators for the loan application */,
  "time_in_residence" INTEGER /* Time in residence of the customer */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the customer */,
  "foreign_worker" TEXT /* Foreign worker status of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the customer record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer submitting the loan application */,
  "loan_duration_mo" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the loan */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., radio/television, education) */,
  "time_employed_yrs" TEXT /* Time employed by the customer in years */,
  "payment_pcnt_income" INTEGER /* Percentage of income dedicated to loan repayment */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, mortgage) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "approved_loan_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the loan approved, if applicable */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the loan application record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the credit history */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the customer (e.g., critical account, current loans paid) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score associated with the credit history */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the credit history record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checking_accounts" (
  "checking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checking account record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the checking account */,
  "checking_account_status" TEXT /* Status of the checking account (e.g., < 0 DM, 0 - 200 DM) */,
  "account_balance" INTEGER /* Current balance in the checking account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction in the checking account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the checking account record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checking_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_accounts" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings account record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the savings account */,
  "savings_account_balance" TEXT /* Balance of the savings account (e.g., unknown/none, < 100 DM) */,
  "account_balance" INTEGER /* Current balance in the savings account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction in the savings account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the savings account record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the employment record */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Job category of the customer (e.g., skilled, unskilled-resident) */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the customer is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the employment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the property record */,
  "property" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., real estate, building society savings/life insurance) */,
  "property_value" INTEGER /* Value of the property */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the property record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_credit" (
  "other_credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other credit record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the other credit record */,
  "other_credit_outstanding" TEXT /* Other credit outstanding (e.g., none) */,
  "credit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the other credit (e.g., bank, credit card company) */,
  "credit_balance" INTEGER /* Current balance of the other credit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the other credit record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_credit_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_ownership" (
  "home_ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home ownership record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the home ownership record */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Type of home ownership (e.g., own, for free) */,
  "property_value" INTEGER /* Value of the home */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the home */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the home ownership record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_ownership_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "loan_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the loan decision was made */,
  "decision_made_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who made the loan decision */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the loan status record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the credit score */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score assigned to the customer */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the credit score was assigned */,
  "score_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the credit score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the credit score record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, car, mortgage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., skilled, unskilled, self-employed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)
